headline: Kenvue (KVUE) Valuation Check After Mixed Share Price And Earnings Multiple Signals
summary: Kenvue snapshot: what the recent data tells you Kenvue (KVUE) has attracted fresh attention as investors weigh its current share price of US$17.43 against its recent return profile, with the stock showing a small gain over the past month but a negative past 3 months. For context, Kenvue reports annual revenue of US$15.1b and net income of US$1.5b across its three segments: Self Care, Skin Health and Beauty, and Essential Health. This gives investors a consumer health business with globally...
